implementation_summary: Added CHANGELOG.md with v0.1.0 release notes.
Release notes summarize the API, redaction defaults, no-network and fake recorder behavior, selected Datadog exporter, validation coverage, examples/docs, and known limitations.
Applied non-blocking review suggestions to make the selected exporter explicit and make the validation statement less tied to a one-off local run.
suggestion_summary: Replace Unreleased with the final release date when tagging v0.1.0.
Consider using README as the durable source for supported Datadog sites.
review_fix_summary: Updated the Datadog section heading to Selected Datadog Exporter.
Reworded the validation bullet to describe documented release-readiness gates.
